notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone grounds into a force out, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner. Bobby Witt Jr. scores. Salvador Perez out at 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Trea Turner.

notableEvents.label: Salvador Perez plunked
notableEvents.detail: Salvador Perez hit by pitch. Kameron Misner to 3rd. Michael Massey to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kameron Misner pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kameron Misner flies out to right fielder Gabriel Rincones Jr. Tyler Tolbert to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Michael Massey pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Massey singles on a ground ball to center fielder Justin Crawford. Tyler Tolbert scores. Luke Maile to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone grounds into a force out, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner. Bobby Witt Jr. scores. Salvador Perez out at 2nd. Throwing error by shortstop Trea Turner.

notableEvents.label: Edmundo Sosa GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Edmundo Sosa grounds into a double play, third baseman Josh Rojas to second baseman Nick Loftin to first baseman Salvador Perez. Brandon Marsh out at 2nd. Edmundo Sosa out at 1st.
